title: Agent dispatcher for handling WebSocket commands and managing session lifecycle
purpose: Routes incoming agent commands to appropriate session handlers and manages WebSocket subscriptions and event replay.

steps.content: Process the command based on its kind.
For agent_start, create or retrieve the session and subscribe to events.
For agent_resume, attempt to resume the session or fall back to creating it.
For agent_send, validate the session is alive and forward the message.
For agent_cancel, cancel the current turn in the session.
For agent_permission_resolve, resolve a permission decision.
For agent_commit_push_pr, execute a commit and push PR operation.
IF any command fails, emit an error to the caller.
Add the session to the WebSocket's subscriptions.
Retrieve the transcript for the session.
For each event in the transcript, send it to the WebSocket.
Ignore errors from sending to dead WebSockets.

methods.name: emitErrorToCaller
methods.normalized_params: (ws: AgentWS, sessionId: string, where: ErrorEvent['where'], message: string, recoverable: boolean): void

steps.content: Construct an error event with the provided details.
Send the error event to the WebSocket.
Ignore errors from sending to dead WebSockets.
